name: Heavenly Strawberry Trifle
recipeIngredient: 1 Angel food cake (store-bought, homemade, mix, whatever)
2 oz - 6 oz cartons non-fat strawberry yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cake vertically into halves.
2. Freeze half of the cake for future use (such as dipping in hot chocolate fudge sauce).
3. Tear the other half into 3/4 inch pieces.
4. Prepare the topping mix as directed on the package using skim milk.
5. Layer half the cake pieces, yogurt, whipped topping, strawberries, and kiwi in a 2-quart serving bowl.
6. Repeat layers and sprinkle with almonds.
7. Garnish with whole strawberries if desired.
8. Refrigerate at least two hours.
Serves 12 (little, tiny, miserly servings) or 6 real people.
